titles.title: Statistical Analyst
titles.description: Collects, cleans, and analyzes data to produce statistical summaries, trends, and reports for decision-makers. Often supports program evaluation, performance measurement, and ad hoc data requests using spreadsheets, databases, and statistical software.

titles.title: Biostatistician
titles.description: Applies statistical methods to biological, medical, or public health data to design studies and analyze results. Commonly works with clinical trials, epidemiology, and research datasets to support scientific conclusions.

titles.title: Research Data Analyst
titles.description: Prepares and analyzes research data, builds datasets, and creates tables, charts, and reports for studies or evaluations. Works closely with researchers to ensure data quality, interpret findings, and support evidence-based decisions.

titles.title: Statistical Programmer
titles.description: Writes and maintains code to process, validate, and analyze data for statistical reporting and research. Typically uses statistical programming tools to generate datasets, tables, figures, and reproducible analysis outputs.

titles.title: Survey Statistician
titles.description: Designs, samples, and analyzes surveys to produce reliable estimates about populations or programs. Works on questionnaire design, weighting, variance estimation, and survey methodology to ensure data accuracy and representativeness.

titles.title: Survey Operations Manager
titles.description: Oversees the day-to-day execution of survey projects, including field operations, data collection schedules, vendor coordination, and quality control. Ensures surveys are completed on time, within budget, and according to methodological requirements.

titles.title: Clinical Data Analyst
titles.description: Manages and analyzes clinical or healthcare data to support studies, trials, and operational reporting. Reviews data for completeness and accuracy, creates datasets and reports, and helps translate findings into usable insights.

titles.title: Data Scientist
titles.description: Uses advanced analytics, machine learning, and statistical methods to extract insights from large or complex datasets. Builds models, tests hypotheses, and develops data-driven solutions to support mission needs and decision-making.

titles.title: Research Statistician
titles.description: Designs statistical approaches for research studies and analyzes data to answer scientific or policy questions. Advises on study design, sampling, inference, and interpretation of results for reports or publications.

titles.title: Data Analyst
titles.description: Collects, cleans, and analyzes data to identify trends, answer business questions, and produce routine and ad hoc reports. Uses spreadsheets, databases, and visualization tools to support operational and management decisions.

titles.title: Data Analytics Specialist
titles.description: Develops and applies analytical methods, dashboards, and reports to turn raw data into actionable information. Often supports multiple programs by improving data quality, defining metrics, and explaining results to stakeholders.

titles.title: Statistical Research Analyst
titles.description: Conducts statistical analysis to support research projects, evaluations, and policy studies. Prepares datasets, runs analyses, and summarizes findings in reports, briefs, or presentations.

titles.title: Statistical Research Manager
titles.description: Leads teams that design and conduct statistical research, manage datasets, and produce analytical products. Oversees project planning, methodology, quality assurance, and delivery of research findings.

titles.title: Biostatistical Programmer
titles.description: Develops and validates statistical code for biomedical and clinical research data. Creates analysis datasets, tables, listings, and figures while ensuring outputs meet study and regulatory standards.

titles.title: Clinical Data Scientist
titles.description: Applies advanced analytics to clinical and healthcare data to improve research, operations, or patient outcomes. Builds models, evaluates data patterns, and supports evidence generation for clinical programs or studies.

titles.title: Clinical Statistician
titles.description: Provides statistical expertise for clinical studies, trials, and healthcare research. Designs analyses, interprets results, and helps ensure clinical findings are statistically sound and properly reported.

titles.title: Compensation Policy Director
titles.description: Directs the development, analysis, and implementation of compensation policies and pay programs. Oversees research, benchmarking, and recommendations related to salaries, pay structures, and workforce compensation strategy.

titles.title: Data Engineering Manager
titles.description: Leads the design, build, and maintenance of data pipelines, databases, and data infrastructure. Ensures data is reliable, accessible, and organized for analytics, reporting, and operational use.

titles.title: Economic Data Analyst
titles.description: Analyzes economic, labor, or financial data to identify trends, forecast conditions, and support policy or program decisions. Produces reports and visualizations using statistical and econometric methods.

titles.title: Health Services Research Analyst
titles.description: Analyzes healthcare delivery, utilization, quality, and outcomes data to support health services research. Helps evaluate programs, policies, and interventions using quantitative methods and administrative or clinical datasets.

titles.title: Labor Statistics Director
titles.description: Leads programs that collect, analyze, and publish labor market and employment statistics. Oversees methodology, data quality, reporting, and strategic direction for labor statistics products and initiatives.

titles.title: Medical Research Statistician
titles.description: Applies statistical methods to medical research studies, including clinical, epidemiological, and outcomes research. Supports study design, data analysis, and interpretation of results for scientific reporting.

titles.title: Quantitative Analyst
titles.description: Uses mathematical and statistical techniques to analyze data, build models, and support forecasting or decision-making. Often works on complex datasets to identify patterns, measure risk, or evaluate performance.

titles.title: Senior Statistician
titles.description: Performs advanced statistical analysis and provides expert guidance on study design, methodology, and interpretation of results. Often leads complex analyses, reviews work products, and advises teams on statistical best practices.

titles.title: Student Aid Data Analyst
titles.description: Analyzes student aid, financial aid, or education program data to monitor performance, trends, and compliance. Produces reports and insights that support policy, operations, and decision-making for aid programs.
